content.full_text:
Mental Health Association In Los Angeles County

1336 WILSHIRE BOULEVARD LOS ANGELES, CA 90017-1705 (213) 413-1130 FAX (213) 413-1114


August 19, 1991

Ms. Linda Cassidy
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

The Mental Health Association in Los Angeles County participated in the Proposition 134 campaign. We have filed all proper reports with the Fair Political Practices Commission.

At the time of filing our 'Major Donor' reports a $15,000 loan was recorded. As of August 1, 1991 we have been informed that this loan will not be repayed. Our question is if the Mental Health Association in Los Angeles County is required to file any other report in light of this change? We have made no contributions this year.

Please advise if there are any other reporting responsibilities that we must comply with.

Thank you for your consideration in this matter.

Sincerely,

Wendy G. Bihes
Associate Public Policy Director


REGIONAL OFFICES:

CENTRAL LOS ANGELES                    SAN FERNANDO VALLEY                    ANTELOPE VALLEY                    SOUTH BAY
NORTHEAST LOS ANGELES            SOUTHEAST LOS ANGELES              SAN GABRIEL VALLEY                LONG BEACH

A UNITED WAY HEALTH PARTNER
